sourceFamily: NH-4 Unknown Regions droid statblock damage profiles

canonPolicy.authority: Printed Unknown Regions statblock/action rows are canonical for imported NPC play-mode attacks.
canonPolicy.rowSemantics: Each record represents one printed statblock attack/action row, not a generic equipment definition.
canonPolicy.unmatchedRows: Importer consumers must leave unmatched rows reference-only/manual; do not infer formulas from item names.
canonPolicy.riders: Stun and other non-HP effects remain typed damage/riders/tags according to the canonical packet model.

notes: This batch starts Unknown Regions with sourcebook-printed droid rows that have clear attack and damage expressions.
Rows use the same canonical runtime fields as data/combat/damage-profiles.schema.json and the NH-2 profile schema.
Printed statblock attack totals are intentionally not copied into item attackBonus.

records.name: Claw

evidence: Wanderer Scout Surveyor Droid statblock lists Melee claw +2 (1d4).
The droid systems list 1 claw appendage.

sourceRefs.note: Wanderer Scout Surveyor Droid melee claw row.

notes: The printed row does not state a damage type; claw is authored as slashing using existing natural-weapon conventions.

evidence: Wanderer Scout Surveyor Droid statblock lists Ranged stun blaster +3 (3d6 stun).
The action block says Stun Blast: with its stun blaster, the scout surveyor droid can make a ranged attack at +3; on success it deals 3d6 points of stun damage.
Possessions state the stun blaster is treated as a blaster pistol set on stun.

sourceRefs.note: Wanderer Scout Surveyor Droid stun blaster/statblock and Stun Blast action row.
